pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which applies the name via nx_api_patch to the loaded test camera device.
Verified by inspecting data/videos and setup_task.sh, finding umn_crowd.mp4 loaded as the test video.
Verified explicitly in the task.json description requirements.
Verified in task.json description and export_result.sh processing logic.
Verified against data directory name and the real world UMN Unusual Crowd Activity dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real-world 84.0-second video from the UMN Unusual Crowd Activity dataset ('umn_crowd.mp4') loaded as the 'Indoor Area Camera'. Ground truth annotations specify normal crowd behavior transitions to a panic dispersal event exactly at the 60.0-second mark. The expected bookmark name ('Crowd Incident') and report output path ('/home/ga/crowd_report.txt') align precisely with the explicit task description instructions and export script verification logic.
